narrative: Iran tensions drive a crude oil surge toward $105, fueling a geopolitical risk premium as USD/JPY firms to 157.24; 300bp Fed-BoJ carry sustains the bid while intervention risk remains secondary. Swiss CPI acceleration to 0.6% YoY lifts USD/CHF to 0.784 on a 375bp USD carry advantage, while the RBA's hike to 4.35% fails to support AUD/USD at 0.7169. Gold lower -0.13%; equities -0.41%; DXY +0.33%; VIX 18.3. Watch RBNZ meeting May 27.
